1 FOOT OF WATER OVER INTERSECTION OF LEE ROAD AND SWEET HOME ROAD. DEEP DITCHES OVERFLOWING INTO ROAD. THEY MEASURED 6.5 OF RAIN IN LESS THAN 2 HOURS AT THIS LOCATION.
